name: should adjust specified year params when year_offset is specified
description: Test case for should adjust specified year params when year_offset is specified
expected_query: with "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2022,2023]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years WHERE player.pos IN ('WR')), "t335663aa03c109b219d83d28dc9b4e11" as (select COALESCE(trg_pid) as pid, "nfl_plays"."year", SUM(CASE WHEN trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as trg_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' group by "nfl_plays"."year", COALESCE(trg_pid)), "tac1a9a9ff8d5a35a78c36542c31ae6b1" as (select "pg"."pid", ROUND((1.5 * COUNT(CASE WHEN nfl_plays.trg_pid = pg.pid THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)) + (0.7 * SUM(CASE WHEN nfl_plays.trg_pid = pg.pid THEN nfl_plays.dot ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(nfl_plays.dot), 0)), 4) as weighted_opp_rating_from_plays, "nfl_plays"."year" from "nfl_plays" inner join "player_gamelogs" as "pg" on "nfl_plays"."esbid" = "pg"."esbid" and "nfl_plays"."off" = "pg"."tm" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and ("trg_pid" is not null) group by "pg"."pid", "nfl_plays"."year"), "tf868a18fa1c7aaeef240635de33664cc" as (select "pg"."pid", ROUND((1.5 * COUNT(CASE WHEN nfl_plays.trg_pid = pg.pid THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)) + (0.7 * SUM(CASE WHEN nfl_plays.trg_pid = pg.pid THEN nfl_plays.dot ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(nfl_plays.dot), 0)), 4) as weighted_opp_rating_from_plays, "nfl_plays"."year" from "nfl_plays" inner join "player_gamelogs" as "pg" on "nfl_plays"."esbid" = "pg"."esbid" and "nfl_plays"."off" = "pg"."tm" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and ("trg_pid" is not null) and "nfl_plays"."motion" = true group by "pg"."pid", "nfl_plays"."year"), "t58d1a8718265b450fdac8db4413d94c1" as (select "pg"."pid", ROUND((1.5 * COUNT(CASE WHEN nfl_plays.trg_pid = pg.pid THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)) + (0.7 * SUM(CASE WHEN nfl_plays.trg_pid = pg.pid THEN nfl_plays.dot ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(nfl_plays.dot), 0)), 4) as weighted_opp_rating_from_plays, "nfl_plays"."year" from "nfl_plays" inner join "player_gamelogs" as "pg" on "nfl_plays"."esbid" = "pg"."esbid" and "nfl_plays"."off" = "pg"."tm" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and ("trg_pid" is not null) and "nfl_plays"."play_action" = true group by "pg"."pid", "nfl_plays"."year"), "tc171b59066f579e6e6136158d10f6f16" as (select "pg"."pid", ROUND((1.5 * COUNT(CASE WHEN nfl_plays.trg_pid = pg.pid THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)) + (0.7 * SUM(CASE WHEN nfl_plays.trg_pid = pg.pid THEN nfl_plays.dot ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(nfl_plays.dot), 0)), 4) as weighted_opp_rating_from_plays, "nfl_plays"."year" from "nfl_plays" inner join "player_gamelogs" as "pg" on "nfl_plays"."esbid" = "pg"."esbid" and "nfl_plays"."off" = "pg"."tm" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and ("trg_pid" is not null) and "nfl_plays"."dwn" in (1, 2) group by "pg"."pid", "nfl_plays"."year") select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, "player_seasonlogs"."espn_open_score" AS "espn_open_score_0", "t335663aa03c109b219d83d28dc9b4e11"."trg_from_plays" AS "trg_from_plays_0", "tac1a9a9ff8d5a35a78c36542c31ae6b1"."weighted_opp_rating_from_plays" AS "weighted_opp_rating_from_plays_0", "tf868a18fa1c7aaeef240635de33664cc"."weighted_opp_rating_from_plays" AS "weighted_opp_rating_from_plays_1", "t58d1a8718265b450fdac8db4413d94c1"."weighted_opp_rating_from_plays" AS "weighted_opp_rating_from_plays_2", "tc171b59066f579e6e6136158d10f6f16"."weighted_opp_rating_from_plays" AS "weighted_opp_rating_from_plays_3", "player_years"."year", "player"."pos" from "player" inner join "player_years" on "player_years"."pid" = "player"."pid" inner join "player_seasonlogs" on "player_seasonlogs"."pid" = "player"."pid" and player_seasonlogs.year = player_years.year and player_seasonlogs.year IN (2023,2022) and "player_seasonlogs"."seas_type" = 'REG' left join "t335663aa03c109b219d83d28dc9b4e11" on "t335663aa03c109b219d83d28dc9b4e11"."pid" = "player"."pid" and t335663aa03c109b219d83d28dc9b4e11.year = player_years.year and t335663aa03c109b219d83d28dc9b4e11.year IN (2023,2022) left join "tac1a9a9ff8d5a35a78c36542c31ae6b1" on "tf868a18fa1c7aaeef240635de33664cc"."pid" = "player"."pid" and tf868a18fa1c7aaeef240635de33664cc.year = player_years.year + -1 left join "t58d1a8718265b450fdac8db4413d94c1" on "t58d1a8718265b450fdac8db4413d94c1"."pid" = "player"."pid" and t58d1a8718265b450fdac8db4413d94c1.year = player_years.year + -1 left join "tc171b59066f579e6e6136158d10f6f16" on "tc171b59066f579e6e6136158d10f6f16"."pid" = "player"."pid" and tc171b59066f579e6e6136158d10f6f16.year = player_years.year + -1 where player.pos IN ('WR') and player_seasonlogs.espn_open_score > '0' group by player.fname, player.lname, "player_seasonlogs"."espn_open_score", "t335663aa03c109b219d83d28dc9b4e11"."trg_from_plays", "tac1a9a9ff8d5a35a78c36542c31ae6b1"."weighted_opp_rating_from_plays",
